title: German Apple Crumble
description: A classic German dessert made with tender apples, crispy oat topping, and a hint of cinnamon.

ingredients.name: Apples (4-5)
ingredients.notes: Granny Smith or other baking apples

ingredients.name: Crispy Oats
ingredients.notes: Rolled oats or crispy oat topping

instructions: Peel, core, and slice the apples. In a large bowl, combine the sliced apples, cornstarch, and cinnamon. Mix until the apples are evenly coated.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the crispy oats, crumble, and melted butter until crumbly.
Top the apple mixture with the crispy oat topping.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Brush the beaten egg over the top of the crispy oat topping to create a golden glaze.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the glaze is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
